title: MD
biography: Abu al-Qasim al-Zahrawi (Abulcasis) was an Arab physician in Islamic Spain who is considered the father of surgery. His 30-volume medical encyclopedia Kitab al-Tasrif described over 200 surgical instruments and techniques that influenced surgery for centuries.
aiSummary: Abu al-Qasim al-Zahrawi is a surgery specialist at Caliphate of Cordoba. Based in Cordoba.

timeline.title: Published Kitab al-Tasrif
timeline.description: Completed his 30-volume medical encyclopedia containing the first illustrated surgical manual with over 200 instruments
